sources.title: Samsung Art Store Adds Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 Collection
sources.excerpt: Samsung Electronics, global display leader and provider of the Official Art TV of Art Basel, today announced the launch of the Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 Collection. The curated digital exhibition will be available exclusively on Samsung Art Store and features 20 contemporary artists showcased at Art Basel Hong Kong, being held March 27-29 at the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre. At a dedicated booth, Samsung will demonstrate how its Micro RGB, OLED and The Frame Pro display each artwork
